confirmation.message: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to continue?

login.title: Login
login.username_mismatch: Password or username did not match!

errors.no_rights: User has no access rights or configuration error.

not_found_page.url_not_found_msg: The requested URL was not found on this server. That’s all I know.

sparql_editor.title: SPARQL Query & Update
sparql_editor.helpInfo: The SPARQL Query & Update view is a unified editor for queries and updates. Enter any SPARQL query or update and click Run to execute it. The view also allows you to save queries for future retrieval and execution in the SPARQL editor.

errors.saved_query_load_failed: Could not get data for saved query: {{savedQueryName}}; {{error}}
errors.shared_query_load_failed: Could not get data for shared query: {{sharedQueryName}}; {{error}}
errors.saved_queries_load_failed: Error! Could not get saved queries
errors.get_repo_size_error: Could not get repository size for: {{repo}}; {{error}}
errors.add_known_prefixes_failed: Error! Could not add known prefixes

on_auto_execute_query.title: Confirm execution
on_auto_execute_query.message:
This is an update and it may change the data in the repository.
Are you sure you want to execute it automatically?

on_language_change.title: Change language
on_language_change.message: Changing the language will reload the page. Are you sure you want to continue?

on_page_leave.title: Confirm exit
on_page_leave.none_queries_non_updates: Are you sure that you want to exit?
on_page_leave.none_queries_one_update:
You have running 1 update.
Are you sure that you want to exit?
on_page_leave.none_queries_updates:
You have running {{updatesCount}} updates.
Are you sure that you want to exit?
on_page_leave.one_query_non_updates:
You have running 1 query, that will be aborted.
Are you sure that you want to exit?
on_page_leave.one_query_one_update:
You have running 1 query and 1 update. The query will be aborted.
Are you sure that you want to exit?
on_page_leave.one_query_updates:
You have running 1 query and {{updatesCount}} updates. The query will be aborted.
Are you sure that you want to exit?
on_page_leave.queries_non_updates:
You have running {{queriesCount}} queries. The queries will be aborted
Are you sure that you want to exit?
on_page_leave.queries_one_update:
You have running {{queriesCount}} queries and 1 update. The queries will be aborted
Are you sure that you want to exit?
on_page_leave.queries_updates:
You have running {{queriesCount}} queries and {{updatesCount}} updates. The queries will be aborted.
Are you sure that you want to exit?
